ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contigs" (
  "contig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contig */,
  "contig_name" TEXT /* Name of the contig */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contig */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The actual sequence of the contig */,
  "length" INTEGER /* The length of the contig */,
  "gc_content" REAL /* The GC content (percentage of G and C nucleotides) of the contig */,
  "coverage" REAL /* The coverage of the contig in the assembly */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* A reference to the assembly from which the contig originates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "contig_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contig the gene belongs to */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "gaps" TEXT /* Gaps in the gene sequence */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage of the gene sequence */,
  "identity" REAL /* Identity of the gene sequence */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the gene */,
  "product" TEXT /* Product of the gene */,
  "resistance" TEXT /* Antibiotic resistance pattern of the gene */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., aph, bla) */,
  "strand" TEXT /* The strand on which the gene is located (e.g., +, -) */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* The reading frame of the gene */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the gene data */,
  "annotations" TEXT /* Additional annotations or comments about the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_product FOREIGN KEY ("product") REFERENCES products ("product_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_accession FOREIGN KEY ("accession") REFERENCES accessions ("accession_number"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_contig_id FOREIGN KEY ("contig_id") REFERENCES contigs ("contig_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_resistance FOREIGN KEY ("resistance") REFERENCES resistances ("resistance_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "accessions" (
  "accession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accession */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accession */,
  "organism" TEXT /* The organism from which the accession originates */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the accession (e.g., NCBI, ENA) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the accession */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* The date when the accession was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accession_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "molecular_function" TEXT /* The molecular function of the product */,
  "biological_process" TEXT /* The biological process associated with the product */,
  "cellular_component" TEXT /* The cellular component where the product is found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resistances" (
  "resistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resistance pattern */,
  "resistance_name" TEXT /* Name of the resistance pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resistance pattern */,
  "mechanism" TEXT /* The mechanism of resistance (e.g., target modification, efflux) */,
  "evidence_level" TEXT /* The level of evidence supporting the resistance (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resistance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* The session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
